description: baseline lgbm small features
rank predictions within each era before outputting
switch from small to medium features (780 features)
increase colsample_bytree from 0.1 to 0.3 for richer feature sampling per tree
increase n_estimators to 5000 with learning_rate=0.005 for better generalization
train on target_cyrus instead of target for stronger signal
add subsample=0.8 and subsample_freq=1 for stochastic row sampling regularization
downsample every 2nd era instead of every 4th to double training data
use all eras for training (no downsampling) to maximize training data
increase max_depth to 6 and num_leaves to 63 for moderately deeper trees
add min_child_samples=200 for leaf-level regularization to reduce overfitting
increase max_depth to 7 and num_leaves to 127 for deeper trees with more leaves
ensemble predictions from 3 targets (target, target_cyrusd_20, target_victor_20) to improve CORR and MMC
per-era mean-centering of predictions (subtract era mean to remove era-level bias)
XGBoost + LightGBM ensemble (average predictions) with DOWNSAMPLE_EVERY_N_ERAS=4
2-target ensemble (target + target_cyrusd_20) with DOWNSAMPLE_EVERY_N_ERAS=4 for faster runtime
2-target ensemble (target + target_cyrusd_20) with num_leaves=255 (2^8-1) for deeper trees
2-target ensemble (target + target_victor_20) with num_leaves=255 to test victor signal
target+cyrusd_20 ensemble with colsample_bytree=0.05 for stronger feature regularization
evaluate on all validation eras (remove validation downsampling) for more stable corr_sharpe estimate
add reg_lambda=1.0 (L2 regularization) to target+cyrusd_20 ensemble for additional regularization
